title: Charred Polish Sausage Gratin
description: A comforting, cheesy gratin dish featuring charred polish sausage, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook charred polish sausage in a skillet until browned, about 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix shredded cheddar cheese and grated cheese.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange cooked sausage and top with cheese mixture.
Arrange sliced gratin on top of cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and cheese is melted.
